resources.string: Ubushuhe %1$s bwagabanutse ku rugero rwawe rwa %2$s
Imburi: Gukoresha iyo nzira iri hejuru birashobora gutuma bateri yawe igenda vuba kuruta uko bisanzwe
Custom URL ntiyishirwaho, canke ni ubusa. Ushobora kuja mu ma setting kugira ngo wongereko URL y’umugenzo
URL ya %1$s yari ubusa, usabwe kugenzura dosiye yawe ya %2$s maze wongere ugerageze
Inaniwe gufatanya amakuru ya %1$s n’amakuru ya %2$s
Inaniwe gukora neza amakuru y’ikirere avuye kuri server yawe, cane cane amakuru y’%1$s
Ubwoko bwa Forecast ’%1$s’ ntaco bumaze, suzuma dosiye yawe y’imiterere maze ugerageze kandi
Iyi porogaramu yarahinduwe ariko server uriko urahuza ntiyahinduye Ingo Plugin ya weeWX. Fields zishobora kutagaragara neza gushika aho weeWX ihinduwe
Igihe co guhindura ntikitagira akamaro, uguhindura amategeko hanyuma ugasubira kugerageza

%1$s ubu isaba dosiye y’amakuru %2$s iva kuri server ya %3$s, ukeneye guhindura %4$s no guhindura dosiye %5$s imbere y’uko iyi porogaramu ikora neza. Fyonda Ok kugira uronke ibindi bisobanuro kuri %6$s
Ivyo guhindura, swipe refresh screen kugira ngo ushireho
Ubushuhe %1$s bwadutse ku rugero rwawe rwa %2$s
Amatangazo arakenewe kugira ngo akumenyeshe igihe ubushuhe, imvura canke urugero rw’imvura bishitse ku rugero rwawe
Ko wanse uruhusha rwo kumenyesha incuro zibiri, ukeneye kurushoboza mu mitunganyirize aho, gutanguza imitunganyirize?
Turagusavye urindire mu gihe turiko turasuzuma URL mwashizeho

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse mu gihe co kuvugurura, raba %2$s inyandiko ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse mu gihe co kuvugurura, raba %2$s inyandiko ku bisobanuro
Hariho %1$d ikosa ryabonetse mu gihe co kuvugurura, raba %2$s inyandiko ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse mu gihe co kuvugurura, raba %2$s inyandiko ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse mu gihe co kuvugurura, raba %2$s inyandiko ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse mu gihe co kuvugurura, raba %2$s inyandiko ku bisobanuro

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse muri dosiye %2$s, raba dosiye %2$s yabonetse kuri %3$s canke raba inyandiko %4$s ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse muri dosiye %2$s, raba dosiye %2$s yabonetse kuri %3$s canke raba inyandiko %4$s ku bisobanuro
Hariho ikosa %1$d ryabonetse muri dosiye %2$s, raba dosiye %2$s yabonetse kuri %3$s canke raba inyandiko %4$s ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse muri dosiye %2$s, raba dosiye %2$s yabonetse kuri %3$s canke raba inyandiko %4$s ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse muri dosiye %2$s, raba dosiye %2$s yabonetse kuri %3$s canke raba inyandiko %4$s ku bisobanuro
Hariho amakosa %1$d yabonetse muri dosiye %2$s, raba dosiye %2$s yabonetse kuri %3$s canke raba inyandiko %4$s ku bisobanuro

resources.string: Radar ubwoko bwa ’%1$s’ ntaco bimaze, suzuma dosiye yawe y’imiterere maze ugerageze kandi
Radar URL ntiyishizweho. Ushobora kuja mu ma settings kugira ngo uhindure
Imenyesha buri musi iyo imvura ishitse ku rugero rwategekanije
Imburi iyo imvura irenze urugero rukomeye rushingiye ku gihe imvura imara
Imvura %1$s mu %2$d %3$s iheze yashitse ku rugero ’Rukaze’
Imburi iyo imvura irenze urugero rw’imburi bishingiye ku gihe imvura imara
Imvura ya %1$s mu %2$d %3$s iheze yashitse ku rugero rwa ’Imburi’
Imburi iyo imvura irenze urugero rw’isaha bishingiye ku gihe imvura imara
Imvura ya %1$s mu %2$d %3$s iheze yashitse ku rugero rwa ’Watch’
Woba uzi neza ko ushaka gukuraho amakuru yose?
Imenyesha gushika incuro zibiri ku musi iyo ubushuhe bushitse ku rugero rwashizweho
Ushireho ivyahinduwe n’amaboko, ariko nta kintu na kimwe cari carashizweko
URL yashizwe ku rugero canke yari ubusa
Ntiyashoboye guhuza canke gukura kuri URL y’umugenzo yavuzwe
Ntiyashoboye guhuza canke gukuraho ivy’imbere y’igihe
Ntiyashoboye guhuza canke gukuraho radar= ishusho kuri internet
Ntiyashoboye guhuza canke gukuraho ivyagezwe kuri server yawe
Ntiyashoboye guhuza canke gukuraho ishusho y’urubuga kuri server yawe
Webcam URL ntabwo ishizweho canke ni ubusa
Vyoba vyavuguruwe ariko uruja n’uruza rwa WiFi rutaboneka
